symbols.description: One or multiple comma-separated stock symbols (tickers) to retrieve, e.g. AAPL or AAPL,MSFT

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

exchange.description: Stock exchange to filter results by, specified by Market Identifier Code, e.g. XNAS

latest.description: Whether to fetch the most recent stock market data

specificDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2020-01-01, or in ISO-8601 date format, e.g. 2020-05-21T00:00:00+0000

dateFrom.description: Timeframe start date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2020-01-01, or in ISO-8601 date format, e.g. 2020-05-21T00:00:00+0000

dateTo.description: Timeframe end date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2020-01-01, or in ISO-8601 date format, e.g. 2020-05-21T00:00:00+0000

exchange.description: Stock exchange to retrieve, specified by Market Identifier Code, e.g. XNAS
